capabilities.description: Audit API routes for auth, rate limiting, CSRF, and sanitization coverage
Implement a security fix for a reported vulnerability in middleware or API routes
Review authentication and authorization setup for a specific route or feature
Check compliance status: DPA agreements, EU AI Act readiness, GDPR requirements

skills.description: Check a specific API route for auth, rate-limit, CSRF, and sanitization middleware
skills.returns: { hasAuth: boolean, hasRateLimit: boolean, hasCsrf: boolean, hasSanitize: boolean, findings: string[] }

skills.description: Verify security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) are correctly configured in next.config.ts
skills.returns: { headers: Array<{ name: string, present: boolean, value: string }> }
